location.office_time_required: 3 days per week on Mondays, Wednesdays, and Thursdays

level_signals: Base range $128,000-$160,000 consistent with mid-senior PM in SF

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: 3+ years of product management experience, ideally with meaningful time spent on consumer-facing products
Track record of shipping products with measurable user and business impact
Strong ability to drive cross-functional alignment - you manage ambiguity, complexity, and interdependencies in an organized way
Data fluency - you define and analyze metrics that inform the success of your products, and you're comfortable running and interpreting experiments
Strong communication skills across audiences and levels, including the ability to convey complex tradeoffs in a clear and compelling way
Customer obsessed - strong user empathy and experience in the customer discovery and product development process

nice_to_haves.raw_text_from_jd: Ideally have experience with marketplace products or premium consumer experiences
Bonus: familiarity with travel platforms, supply-side marketplace dynamics, or EV/sustainability initiatives

scope.surface: Lyft Black and Black SUV premium ride modes; EV/electrification strategy
primary_metrics_inferred: Rider satisfaction and retention for premium modes
core_responsibilities: Own product area end-to-end from problem identification through launch, growth, and iteration
Set team goals, success metrics, and roadmap aligned with Lyft's mission
Drive rapid experimentation and learning culture
Lead a cross-functional pod of engineers, designers, and data scientists
Deeply understand customers across rider segments using data analysis, market research, and user research
Collaborate across the company and communicate roadmaps and priorities to partner teams and executives
Leverage AI tools and emerging technology to accelerate workflows and enhance products
Own technology behind Lyft's electrification strategy

compensation.equity_form: potential equity offering mentioned (form not specified)

green_flags: Compensation range disclosed ($128K-$160K base) in SF
High-ownership role tied to a stated strategic bet for the company
Clear product surface (Lyft Black/Black SUV + EV strategy)
Hybrid flexibility with up to 4 weeks fully remote per year
Encourages broad applicant pool via equal opportunity language
red_flags: Visa sponsorship status not stated — unclear
Hybrid requires 3 specific days in office (Mon/Wed/Thu) in SF — no flexibility on which days
Role spans both premium modes and EV/electrification — potentially broad scope for one PM
No explicit mention of team size or reporting structure

fields_inferred_not_stated: seniority.level (inferred from comp range and years requirement)
ambiguities: The must-have for '3+ years of product management experience' includes the qualifier 'ideally with meaningful time spent on consumer-facing products' — the word 'ideally' softens it, but it appears in the required Experience section, so classified as hard with qualifier noted.
Marketplace or premium consumer experience is listed under Experience section but uses 'Ideally' — classified as nice_to_have.
